overview.Name: Cohen & Company Inc
overview.Description: Cohen & Company Inc. is a publicly owned investment manager. The company is headquartered in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania with additional offices in New York City; Boca Raton, Florida; Chicago, Illinois; Bethesda, Maryland; Boston, Massachusetts; Paris, France; and London, United Kingdom.
overview.Address: CIRA CENTER, PHILADELPHIA, PA, UNITED STATES, 19104
